content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于<t:1757507400:F>  进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯*50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年9月24日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、问题修复
● 修复了「调查」事件选项有时会超出显示范围的问题。
● 修复了敌人「葬骸之主」的「制定策略」中「正面干扰」和「偷袭储备」选项描述不统一的问题。
● 修复了敌人「蹈海者之骸」和「殉道者」的意图「海洋的召唤」描述中召唤蹈海者团块数量错误问题。
● 修复了「忘却篇」调查行动 「普通 5-12」编队时，点击第一个位置切换唤醒体时，选择界面未能正常显示唤醒体的问题。
● 修复了「幻梦深潜」探索过程中获得造物后，左侧评分项信息位置会错误下移的问题。
 
二、英文本地化调整
● 修复了皮克曼的指令卡「绘影摹形」部分选项没有正确显示的问题。
● 修复了相位对弈模式中部分命轮、技能描述的措辞不统一问题。
● 修复了「胚胎」卡牌、猩红熔炉中的描述问题。
● 修复了部分文本中唤醒体皮克曼名字拼写错误的问题。
● 修复了部分剧情文本中的术语翻译。
● 优化了活动「画布的暗面」、皮克曼篇章「畸世绘」界面中的翻译。
● 优化了图鉴中唤醒体皮克曼的广播剧字幕翻译。

**V2.3.2.2 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on <t:1757507400:F>  . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on September 24, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
1. Problem Fix
● Fixed the issue where the "Investigation" event options sometimes exceeded the display range.
● Fixed the inconsistency in the descriptions of the "Interference" and "Ambush" options in the enemy "Lord of Necrovia's" "Strategy."
● Fixed the issue with the number of Seafarer chunks summoned in the enemy's "Seafarer's Remains" and "Martyr" intention description "Summon of the Sea".
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener selection interface did not display properly when switching Awakeners by clicking the first position during the "Faded Legacy" investigation action "Normal 5-12" lineup.
● Fixed the issue where the position of the score item information on the left would incorrectly shift down after obtaining a Relic during the "Phantasmal Dive" exploration.

II. Localization Adjustments for English
● Fixed the issue where some options of Pickman's Command Card "Lifelike Rendition" were not displayed correctly.
● Fixed the inconsistent wording of some Wheel of Destiny and Skill descriptions in Traphase mode.
● Fixed the description issues for the "Embryo" card and the Crimson Furnace.
● Fixed the spelling error of the Awakener Pickman name in some texts.
● Fixed the translation of terminology in some story texts.
● Optimized the translations in the event "Dark Side of the Canvas" and the Pickman chapter "Ghastly Canvas" interface.
● Optimized the subtitle translation for the Awakener Pickman in the illustrated guide.
